summary: Find and verify the official homepage for each of the 137 firms

results.firm: Aquatic Capital Management — United States, Chicago

results.note: arrowstreet.com is a separate unrelated firm; arrowstreetcapital.com is the Boston quant manager.

results.firm: Castle Ridge Asset Management — Canada, Toronto

results.note: Cumberland's own dedicated domain; also reachable via drw.com/cumberland as a DRW subsidiary.
Chicago prop trading firm; verified homepage. A separate eagle-seven.com exists but is a different entity.
No live official site; eladian.com is a parked GoDaddy for-sale domain and firm appears defunct (Crunchbase: permanently closed). Only third-party profiles found.
Global Trading Systems (GTS), NYC market maker; homepage is gtsx.com.
Millennium Management's official homepage is at mlp.com.

results.firm: PEAK6 Capital Management — United States, Austin
results.note: PEAK6 Capital Management is a division; corporate homepage is peak6.com (Capital Management page: peak6.com/peak6-capital-management/).
Cubist Systematic Strategies is Point72's systematic division; its page is point72.com/cubist/.

results.firm: Quantitative Investment Management (QIM) — United States, Charlottesville

results.note: Homepage is radixtrading.co; do not confuse with radix.trading (an unrelated crypto trading firm).

results.firm: Renaissance Technologies — USA, East Setauket NY
SBB Research Group — United States, Northbrook
results.note: sbbrg.com is the firm; sbbrg.org is its separate philanthropic foundation.

results.firm: Schonfeld Strategic Advisors — United States, New York
Teza Technologies (Teza Group) — United States, Chicago

results.note: Firm brands itself 'Vatic Labs'; 'Vatic Investments' is the same NYC quant firm.
German/EU asset manager; site has geo access restrictions (US/CA/JP/AU) but is the official homepage.

Cantab Capital Partners was acquired by GAM (2016) and renamed GAM Systematic Cambridge / GAM Cantab; this is the current official page. Legacy site cantabcapital.com still resolves but the firm now sits under gam.com.
Primary corporate homepage; cfm.com is a parallel domain also used by the firm.
Firm rebranded from 'Da Vinci Derivatives' to 'Da Vinci Trading'; official site is davincitrading.com.
AHL and Numeric are investment engines under Man Group (man.com/ahl); no separate corporate homepages.
Official homepage is on the .ai TLD (quadrature.ai).
RSJ Securities section lives under the RSJ group site rsj.com (e.g. rsj.com/en/securities/).
Trading/prop arm at alpha-grep.com; the separate asset-management affiliate is alphagrepim.com.
Site titled 'APT Research'; the New Delhi proprietary trading firm (A.P.T. = Algorithms, Profit and Trust).
Chinese name 倍漾量化, Nanjing-based AI-native quant fund.

results.firm: Century Frontier Asset Management (世纪前沿)

results.note: Tokyo JPX-colocation HFT firm (ダルマ・キャピタル株式会社); NOT darma.capital, which is an unrelated US crypto/DeFi firm.
Primary corporate/asset-management homepage; firm also runs dolatcapital.in for its research/dev arm.
Korean robo-advisor (Fount Inc., Seoul); corporate subsite at corp.fount.co.
Tokyo HQ site (JP/EN); firm also uses gci-am.com as an international-facing site.
Prop-trading firm site; the separate asset-management arm uses gham.asia.
High-Flyer (幻方量化) quant fund homepage (EN version at /en); DeepSeek is its spin-off AI firm at deepseek.com.
Registered entity is 因诺(上海) (Shanghai); HTTP-only site.
Ningbo 金戈量锐 (Ningbo Jinge Liangrui Asset Mgmt); HTTP-only site, corroborated by @jingefund.com contact email; could not fetch over HTTPS.

results.firm: Longqi Technology (龙旗科技) — China, Hangzhou
results.note: Firm trades as Longqi/Hangzhou Longqi Scientific Investment; official site is sci-inv.com (English: en.sci-inv.com).

results.firm: Mingshi Fund (鸣石基金) — China, Shanghai
Mingshi Investment (Mengxi) (蒙玺投资) — China, Shanghai
results.note: Distinct firm from Mingshi Fund (鸣石); this is Shanghai Mengxi/蒙玺投资.
Primary homepage is openfutures.in; a secondary domain openfutures.co.in also exists.

results.firm: Optimus Prime Securities and Research — India, Bengaluru
Ortus Capital Management — Hong Kong, Hong Kong
results.note: Official site per Bloomberg/D&B/LinkedIn and an indexed live subpage (ortuscapital.com/page/disclaimer); direct homepage load could not be re-verified because the sandbox has no DNS/network access.

results.firm: Qilin Investment (启林投资) — China, Shanghai
results.note: Shanghai Qilin Investment (启林投资) official site is 70capital.com. NOT qilincapital.org, which is an unrelated German firm (Qilin Capital, Zossen).
qraftec.com is the corporate homepage; qraftaietf.com is their separate AI-ETF product site.
Official site is qpalpha.com (en.qpalpha.com for English). NOT quantpi.com, which is an unrelated German AI-testing company.

results.firm: Zhuoshi Private Fund (卓识私募基金)
results.note: Homepage brands as 卓识基金 / Zhuoshi Fund; confirmed via fetch.

No official site findable. This is the Nikolay Aleksandrov quant fund (ex-ExodusPoint/Millennium, ~$500M Morgan Stanley mandate); secretive new launch. Surfaced Continuum Capital/Trading domains are unrelated firms.
Crypto algo-trading firm / liquidity provider, Tel Aviv + SF.
Israeli ML-HFT firm, Herzliya (final.co.il).
Riyadh low-latency trading firm; distinct from muwazana.ae (a UAE tax-advisory firm).
Sydney prop-trading firm; not the US 'Epoch Investment Partners'.
Sydney market maker; official domain is nmftrading.com.
Prop-trading firm, Austinmer/Wollongong NSW.
Sydney (Paddington) prop-trading firm.
Sao Paulo systematic/quant asset manager.
Rio de Janeiro quantitative asset manager.
Rio de Janeiro quantitative asset manager (muranoinvest.com; not muranoip.com).
Buenos Aires quantitative hedge fund; root domain prack-am.com.
